recommendations.title: The Flu
recommendations.overview: A case of the flu quickly morphs into a pandemic. As the death toll mounts and the living panic, the government plans extreme measures to contain it.

recommendations.title: The Warrior

recommendations.title: Hijack 1971
recommendations.overview: In the year 1971, former Korean Air Force fighter pilot Tae-In (Ha Jung-Woo) works as a pilot for a commercial airline. He faces a crisis inside a hijacked flight with the passengers, including Yong-Dae (Yeo Jin-Goo), and his crew members, including

recommendations.title: The Call
recommendations.overview: Connected by phone in the same home but 20 years apart, a caller puts a woman’s past — and life — on the line to change her own fate.

recommendations.title: 12.12: The Day
recommendations.genres: Drama, Thriller, Action, War, History, Crime

recommendations.title: Bring the Soul: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A glimpse into K-pop group BTS’ world away from the stage, featuring intimate group discussions alongside spectacular concert performances from their world tour.

recommendations.title: Confidential Assignment
recommendations.overview: When a crime organization from North Korea crosses borders and enters South Korean soil, a South Korean detective must cooperate with a North Korean detective to investigate their whereabouts.

recommendations.title: Break the Silence: The Movie
recommendations.overview: K-pop sensation BTS embark on their 2019 'Love Yourself: Speak Yourself' Tour, as the seven members begin to candidly tell personal stories they have never voiced before.

recommendations.title: Nameless Gangster
recommendations.overview: A corrupt customs official joins forces with a vicious gangster to form the most powerful crime partnership in Busan.

recommendations.title: On the Beach at Night Alone
recommendations.overview: In a foreign city, an actress wanders through a seaside town, reflecting on her relationship with a married man. How important is love in one’s life? Younghee wants to find out.
